commit.subject: LU-18287 - Update tests/yaml.sh
commit.message:
LU-18287 - Update tests/yaml.sh

The relase() function is incorrectly tagging rocky 9.x distros
as rhel. In rocky 8.x installs /etc/centos-release still was
written and thus avoiding reading the /etc/redhat-release file,
the latter was hard-coded to return RHEL, this is now updated

Test-Parameters: trivial

Change-Id: If6f79e641601cd78deeb0bdcf822ef9bfec8da5d
Signed-off-by: Lee Ochoa <lochoa@whamcloud.com>
